action.description: Override for the generated action name

resource.description: Override for the generated resource name

deprecated.description: When true, the permission is hidden from view but continues to function for existing tokens

boundaries.description: List of resource types that the permission can be applied to

permissions.description: List of raw permissions the assignable permission expands to

available_for.description: Consumers that may use this permission: granular access tokens, standard roles, and/or custom roles
